design_philosophy: High-trust enterprise feel for Finance/Pension. Linear/Snowflake tier design. Prioritizes data density, optical alignment, crisp typographic hierarchy, and strictly functional color usage. No decorative 'AI slop'.

surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm p-5
surfaces.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white h-screen fixed

spacing_and_layout.tables: Dense padding (py-2 px-3), 13px/14px text size, sticky header, border-b border-slate-200 for rows.

components_instructions.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Use the defined risk colors (Green/Yellow/Orange/Red) consistently across all pie, bar, and trend charts. Maintain minimal grid lines.
components_instructions.heatmap_5x5: Must be visually striking. Grid of 25 squares. X-axis = Impact (1-5), Y-axis = Likelihood (1-5). Colors must smoothly transition: bottom-left (Green) -> middle (Yellow/Orange) -> top-right (Red). Use 'functional.risk_levels.solid' colors.
components_instructions.badges: Use soft backgrounds with darker text (e.g., bg-rose-50 text-rose-700) for inline status tags to reduce eye strain. Solid colors only for critical alerts or matrix squares.
components_instructions.forms: Group sections into distinct white cards or blocks with subtle gray dividers. Inputs should have h-9 or h-10, rounded-md, text-sm.
components_instructions.navigation: Sidebar must highlight active route with a subtle blue tint (bg-blue-50 text-blue-700). Top bar should be h-14, flex items-center, border-b border-slate-200, containing user profile, role, and notifications.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based.

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons for a clean, dense dashboard aesthetic. Maintain 18px or 20px size for standard icons, 16px for inline data icons.

logo.description: Abstract blue geometric pattern, cropped as a square or circle for the NOVARIS brand logo.
logo.placement: Top left of the sidebar, rounded-md, width 32px.
